author: jamescvermont-cyber
description: Multiplayer Word Spiral game. The bot posts a starting word; each player must type a valid word containing the last 3 letters of the previous word before time runs out. Fail to answer and those same 3 letters pass to the next player. Lose all your lives and you're eliminated — last one standing wins!
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores win/game statistics per user per guild.
install_msg: Run `[p]pipinstall english-words` then `[p]load wordspiral`. Requires the wordrush cog to also be installed (shares its word lists).
name: WordSpiral

required_cogs.wordrush: Shares slang and proper noun word lists

short: Chain words using the last 3 letters of the previous word
